case_title: MY FEN LIU VS. PATRICIA MUDRA

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = FORWARD ORDER EXPIRED, RETURN TO SENDER
